title: Part 8 – Passages multiples : voyage d'affaires et note de frais
instructions: Lisez les deux documents, puis répondez aux questions en faisant le lien entre eux.

passages.label: E-mail de l'agence de voyage
passages.text:
From: Horizon Travel Agency
To: Daniel Reyes
Subject: Your Business Trip Itinerary - Chicago

Dear Mr. Reyes,

Please find below the details of your upcoming business trip to Chicago.

Departure: Monday, March 9th, 8:15 a.m., Flight AB204 from Boston to Chicago.
Return: Wednesday, March 11th, 6:40 p.m., Flight AB319 from Chicago to Boston.
Hotel: Lakeside Business Hotel, three nights (March 9-11), breakfast included.

Please remember that, according to your company's travel policy, all taxi receipts above $30 must be submitted with a written explanation. If you need to extend your stay, please contact us at least 48 hours before your return flight.

We wish you a pleasant trip.

Horizon Travel Agency

passages.label: Note de frais de D. Reyes
passages.text:
Expense Report Summary - D. Reyes - Chicago Trip

Taxi (airport to hotel): $42.00 - Note: heavy traffic due to road closure, no shuttle available
Hotel (3 nights): $540.00 - prepaid by company
Client dinner (March 10): $85.00
Taxi (hotel to airport): $28.00

Total to be reimbursed: $155.00
Submitted to: Accounting Department
Status: Pending approval

questions.prompt: How long will Mr. Reyes stay in Chicago?
questions.explanation: L'e-mail précise : "Hotel: Lakeside Business Hotel, three nights (March 9-11)".

questions.prompt: Why does one of the taxi receipts need a written explanation?
questions.explanation: L'e-mail indique que "all taxi receipts above $30 must be submitted with a written explanation", et la note de frais montre un taxi à $42.00 avec une explication ("heavy traffic due to road closure").

questions.prompt: What is included in the hotel reservation?
questions.explanation: L'e-mail précise : "Hotel: Lakeside Business Hotel, three nights (March 9-11), breakfast included".

questions.prompt: What is the total amount Mr. Reyes is requesting in reimbursement?
questions.explanation: La note de frais indique : "Total to be reimbursed: $155.00".

questions.prompt: If Mr. Reyes wants to extend his stay, what should he do?
choices: Pay for an extra night himself
Contact the travel agency at least 48 hours before his return flight
Ask the hotel directly without notice
Submit a request to the accounting department
questions.explanation: L'e-mail précise : "If you need to extend your stay, please contact us at least 48 hours before your return flight".
